headline: Anthony Scaramucci Says Bitcoin Poised To Follow The S-Curve Of Adoption Like Amazon, Microsoft: 'Cannot Be Devalued'

(NASDAQ:MSFT). Scaramucci Says Bitcoin Can’t Be ‘Devalued’ During an interview with RiskReversal Media, Scaramucci said that traditional fiat money is essentially “worthless,” but it gains value because people trust it. headline: French court rejects Amazon book fee challenge – report
summary: The Conseil d'Etat ruled in favour of a government regulation from October 2023 that requires online retailers to levy a minimum fee of €3 on book orders under €35.

content.title: French court rejects Amazon book fee challenge – report
content.summary: The Conseil d'Etat ruled in favour of a government regulation from October 2023 that requires online retailers to levy a minimum fee of €3 on book orders under €35.

thumbnail.caption: Amazon had contested the measure on the grounds that it constituted protectionism and conflicted with European Union law. Credit: Tigarto / Shutterstock.com

headline: Marvell Stock Pops. Why Wall Street Sees Upside.
summary: While chip makers Intel and Micron have been getting all the love in recent days,  Marvell  got a nice bounce after analysts at BofA and Goldman Sachs raised their price targets for it.  Marvell shares closed up 8.2% to $177.95 on Wednesday, for a new record high.  The stock was up a further 4.2% to $185.40 in premarket trading Thursday.

content.title: Marvell Stock Pops. Why Wall Street Sees Upside.
content.summary: While chip makers Intel and Micron have been getting all the love in recent days,  Marvell  got a nice bounce after analysts at BofA and Goldman Sachs raised their price targets for it.  Marvell shares closed up 8.2% to $177.95 on Wednesday, for a new record high.  The stock was up a further 4.2% to $185.40 in premarket trading Thursday.

headline: AI propels global brands to unprecedented growth - Kantar BrandZ
summary: The acceleration of AI has resulted in one of the most profound shifts in brand value, pushing the threshold to enter the Kantar BrandZ Top 100 Most Valuable Global Brands ranking to its highest level. That's according to the 21st edition of Kantar's global analysis, which quantifies how brand contributes to enterprise value.
